overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunny spring countryside. The character travels along a dirt path from a blooming orchard area toward a riverside village with a fortified castle visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: blooming orchard path with split rail fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the blooming orchard area

entered.detail: trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the path
rustic wooden fence running parallel to the path
winding dirt trail through the countryside
large leafy tree with drooping branches
tall green grass fields extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a sunny spring orchard. White flowering trees line the left side behind a split-rail fence, while open grass meadows stretch to the right. The scene is peaceful and devoid of other characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail with distant castle view

events.description: fortified castle with red rooftops becomes visible in the distance on the right
river water comes into view on the right side as the path curves toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves right toward the riverside, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: large medieval castle with red roofs and stone walls visible in the distance
calm blue water running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves right, revealing a stunning view of a fortified castle across a river. The blooming orchard gives way to open riverside terrain with scattered trees. Geralt continues walking along the dirt trail as the castle grows larger in the frame.

events.description: Geralt slows slightly while approaching an armored figure standing by the path
entering populated village area with wooden houses and groups of villagers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past an armored knight and continues toward villagers gathered near wooden farmhouses

notable_agents.action: armored knight in red and silver plate armor standing still by the riverside bushes

entered.detail: rustic wooden farmhouse with thatched roof and stone foundation
low stone retaining wall along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the village outskirts, passing a stationary armored knight by the riverside. Wooden log cabins with thatched roofs line the path, and small groups of villagers become visible ahead. The castle remains visible in the background across the water as the scene transitions from wilderness to settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a peaceful spring countryside that gradually transitions from a blooming orchard into a riverside village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path lined by white flowering trees and split-rail fences, with open grass meadows stretching to the right. As the path curves right, the orchard gives way to open riverside terrain, revealing a stunning view of a fortified castle across the water that grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts from wilderness to settlement as the camera approaches the village outskirts, passing a stationary armored knight by the river. Finally, the path leads past wooden log cabins with thatched roofs toward groups of villagers, while the distant castle remains visible in the background.
